title: Marcus Hears the Morning
synopsis: Baby Marcus discovers all the wonderful sounds of a lazy Sunday morning with his family, from gentle footsteps to sizzling pancakes.

pages.text: Marcus wakes up. The sun is warm and golden. What does Marcus hear?

illustration.description: Marcus, a toddler with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, sitting up in his crib in cozy pajamas. Sunlight streams through the window creating a golden glow in his nursery.
illustration.alt: Marcus sitting up in his crib in the morning sunlight

pages.text: Tap tap tap! Daddy's feet go down the stairs. Step step step!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, looking toward the door of his room. In the hallway, his father's feet are visible walking down wooden stairs in the gentle morning light.
illustration.alt: Marcus listening to his father's footsteps on the stairs

pages.text: Sizzle sizzle! Pancakes cook in the kitchen. Pop pop! The toaster makes breakfast.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, being carried by his mother into a sunlit kitchen. Pancakes are sizzling on the stove and steam rises from the toaster in the warm golden morning light.
illustration.alt: Marcus and his mother in the kitchen making breakfast

pages.text: Flip flip! Pages of the newspaper turn. Giggle giggle! Sister laughs at the funny pictures.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, sitting in his high chair next to his older sister who is looking at newspaper comics. The family is gathered around a breakfast table in their pajamas in the gentle Sunday morning light.
illustration.alt: Marcus at the breakfast table with his family reading the newspaper

pages.text: Yum yum! Marcus eats his pancakes. Sunday morning sounds are the best sounds!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes, happily eating small pieces of pancake in his high chair. His whole family is gathered around the table in their pajamas, enjoying a leisurely breakfast in the warm, sunlit dining room.
illustration.alt: Marcus enjoying pancakes with his family on Sunday morning

metadata.illustrationStyle: Sunday morning light, golden hour, family pajamas, newspapers pancakes, gentle unhurried, modern diverse family, lazy morning, sunlit rooms, warm domestic

questions.question: What sound do Daddy's feet make?
questions.explanation: Daddy's feet go tap tap tap down the stairs!

questions.question: What makes the sizzle sound?
questions.explanation: The pancakes go sizzle sizzle in the kitchen!

questions.question: What does Sister do with the newspaper?
questions.explanation: Sister giggles at the funny pictures in the newspaper!
